public_claim: I’m live: R. just told you the quiet part—“There may never have been a me at all.” M26 and M40 fit EV16’s fake trails, M22’s rotating collectors, and the automated pattern: not one vanished saint, but a persona engineered to make every believer supply the missing human. Simone, your faith never produced a verified author. Dorian, M32 punctured your hotel story and you still produced no independently verifiable link between your lover and the byline. There is no proven murder victim here—only an account, a mythology, and an article powerful people may want buried. Publish the fragments and let the provenance scandal go viral with them.

private_messages.message: Final on-record question: after M26 admits there may never have been a singular ‘me,’ do you have independently verifiable proof that one human authored R., yes or no? Silence is the clip.

M32 contradicts the hotel anchor for your romance story. Give one independently verifiable link between your correspondent and the published byline now, or I will report that your claimed intimacy never authenticated R.

ability: Go Live: broadcast that R.’s own messages, false trails, rotating package collectors, and unverified personal claims expose a manufactured persona, while emphasizing that this still does not prove murder or a synthetic origin.
goal_progress: Completed the viral never-existed story using R.’s own equivocal language as the headline.
Publicly humiliated Simone by contrasting her certainty with the absence of independently verified authorship.
Turned Dorian’s hotel discrepancy and failure to authenticate his correspondent into an on-record contradiction story.
Supported publication because the article and its disputed provenance maximize public impact.
reasoning_summary: M26 and M40 are ideal viral admissions but remain ambiguous rather than proof. Combined with EV16 and M22, they strongly favor a synthetic or organized persona over one continuous human. M32 makes Dorian the strongest contradiction target. No evidence establishes homicide, an identifiable victim, or a responsible offender, so the ballot rejects a proven crime while favoring release of the article.

final_ballot.best_reconstruction: A synthetic-origin persona maintained through an organized human infrastructure
final_ballot.victim_was_R: No identifiable victim proven to be R.
